mapper.select: /* SQL ID : MsgAlimDAO.selectAlimUnrdCnt 설 명 : 알림 유형별 읽지 않은 건수 조회 */ SELECT NVL(M.PUSH_CNT, 0) AS PUSH_CNT, NVL(M.SMS_CNT, 0) AS SMS_CNT, NVL(S.SHRTNT_CNT, 0) AS SHRTNT_CNT, NVL(M.ALIMTALK_CNT, 0) AS ALIMTALK_CNT, NVL(M.PUSH_CNT, 0) + NVL(M.SMS_CNT, 0) + NVL(S.SHRTNT_CNT, 0) + NVL(M.ALIMTALK_CNT, 0) AS TOTAL_UNRD_CNT FROM ( SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN A.MBL_SNDNG_TYCD = 'PUSH' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS PUSH_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN A.MBL_SNDNG_TYCD = 'SMS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SMS_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN A.MBL_SNDNG_TYCD = 'ALIM_TALK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ALIMTALK_CNT FROM TB_LMS_MSG_MBL_SNDNG A INNER JOIN TB_LMS_MSG_RCV_TRGTR T ON A.MSG_ID = T.MSG_ID AND A.RCVR_ID = T.USER_ID WHERE A.RCVR_ID = #{userId} AND A.RCVR_DELYN = 'N' AND T.READ_YN = 'N' ) M, ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS SHRTNT_CNT FROM TB_LMS_MSG_SHRTNT_SNDNG A INNER JOIN TB_LMS_MSG_RCV_TRGTR T ON A.MSG_ID = T.MSG_ID AND A.RCVR_ID = T.USER_ID WHERE A.RCVR_ID = #{userId} AND A.RCVR_DELYN = 'N' AND A.SNDNGYN = 'Y' AND T.READ_YN = 'N' ) S

/* SQL ID : MsgAlimDAO.selectShrtntList 설 명 : 쪽지 최근 목록 조회 (읽지 않음 우선, 수신일 내림차순) */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.MSG_SHRTNT_SNDNG_ID AS SNDNG_ID, A.MSG_ID, S.SBJCTNM, A.SNDNGR_ID, A.SNDNGNM, A.SNDNG_TTL, A.SNDNG_DTTM, T.READ_DTTM, NVL(T.READ_YN, 'N') AS IS_READ FROM TB_LMS_MSG_SHRTNT_SNDNG A INNER JOIN TB_LMS_MSG M ON A.MSG_ID = M.MSG_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT S ON M.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_MSG_RCV_TRGTR T ON A.MSG_ID = T.MSG_ID AND A.RCVR_ID = T.USER_ID WHERE A.RCVR_ID = #{userId} AND A.RCVR_DELYN = 'N' AND A.SNDNGYN = 'Y' ORDER BY NVL(T.READ_YN, 'N') ASC, A.SNDNG_DTTM DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{listCnt}

/* SQL ID : MsgAlimDAO.selectMblSndngList 설 명 : 모바일 채널(PUSH/SMS/ALIM_TALK) 최근 목록 조회 */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT B.SNDNG_ID, B.MSG_ID, S.SBJCTNM, B.SNDNGNM, B.SNDNG_TTL, B.SNDNG_DTTM, T.READ_DTTM, NVL(T.READ_YN, 'N') AS IS_READ FROM ( SELECT A.MSG_MBL_SNDNG_ID AS SNDNG_ID, A.MSG_ID, A.RCVR_ID, A.SNDNGNM, A.SNDNG_TTL, A.SNDNG_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_MSG_MBL_SNDNG A WHERE A.RCVR_ID = #{userId} AND A.MBL_SNDNG_TYCD = #{mblSndngTycd} AND A.RCVR_DELYN = 'N' ) B LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_MSG M ON B.MSG_ID = M.MSG_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT S ON M.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_MSG_RCV_TRGTR T ON B.MSG_ID = T.MSG_ID AND B.RCVR_ID = T.USER_ID ORDER BY B.SNDNG_DTTM DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{listCnt}
